zh.lifeSummary: 當Clémence de Foix於1015年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德時，她的父親Bernard-Roger de Foix11012歲，母親Garsinde de Bigorre26歲。她與Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1070年在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒隆享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clémence de Foix于1015年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德时，她的父亲Bernard-Roger de Foix11012岁，母亲Garsinde de Bigorre26岁。她与Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1070年在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒隆享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss French: unexplained. In Switzerland it is found mainly in the Valais Canton.
Catalan: nickname from moix with various possible meanings, including ‘cat’, ‘drunk’, and ‘lame’.

nameMeanings.name: Clémence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Clémence de Foix was born in 1015, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Bernard-Roger de Foix, was 11012 and her mother, Garsinde de Bigorre, was 26. She married Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1070, in Longwy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clémence de Foix est née en 1015, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Bernard-Roger de Foix, avait 11012 ans et sa mère, Garsinde de Bigorre, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1070, à Longwy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clémence de Foix 1015 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bernard-Roger de Foix 11012 und ihre Mutter Garsinde de Bigorre 26. Sie hat Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1070 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Longwy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Foix è nata il nel 1015 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Bernard-Roger de Foix, aveva 11012 anni e sua madre, Garsinde de Bigorre, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1070, nel Longwy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Clémence de Foixが1015年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで生まれた時，父Bernard-Roger de Foixは11012歳，母Garsinde de Bigorreは26歳であった。Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1070年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルロングウイで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clémence de Foix(이)가 1015년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bernard-Roger de Foix(은)는 11012세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Garsinde de Bigorre(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1070년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 론그w이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clémence de Foix nasceu em 1015, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Bernard-Roger de Foix, tinha 11012 anos e sua mãe, Garsinde de Bigorre, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1070, em Longwy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clémence de Foix родилась в 1015 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Bernard-Roger de Foix было 11012 года, а матери, которую звали Garsinde de Bigorre, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1070 г. в местности лонгви, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clémence de Foix nació en 1015, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Bernard-Roger de Foix, tenía 11012 años y su mamá, Garsinde de Bigorre, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Adalbert d'Alsace duc de Haute-Lorraine. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1070, en Longwy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
